Class XavaException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
org.openxava.util.XavaException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConversionException, ElementNotFoundException, FilterException, PropertiesContainerException
public class XavaException extends RuntimeException

RuntimeException since v3.0.

Author:
Javier Paniza
